name: antigravity-agent-broker-bridge
description: Routes queued Agent Broker requests into Antigravity's in-app agent panel.

commands.title: Agent Switchboard Bridge: Start Compressed Chat
Agent Switchboard Bridge: Resume Model Selection Request

agentBrokerBridge.enabled.description: Poll Agent Broker for Antigravity requests.

agentBrokerBridge.pollIntervalMs.description: How often to poll the Agent Broker queue.

agentBrokerBridge.pythonPath.description: Python executable used to run the Agent Broker.

agentBrokerBridge.brokerPath.description: Path to the Agent Broker Python script. Leave empty to auto-detect ~/.agent-broker/agent_broker_mcp.py.

agentBrokerBridge.showCompletionNotifica.description: Show popups for completed Antigravity broker requests. Completion state is still recorded when disabled.

agentBrokerBridge.showCodexInboxNotifica.description: Show popups when a queued Codex inbox request is written.

agentBrokerBridge.autoOpenCodexInbox.description: Automatically open queued Codex inbox requests instead of waiting for a notification click.

agentBrokerBridge.autoSendCodexInboxToCh.description: Attempt to deliver queued Codex inbox callbacks directly into the OpenAI/Codex chat webview before falling back to opening the inbox file.

agentBrokerBridge.autoOpenCodexSidebar.description: Try to open the Codex sidebar before opening a queued Codex inbox request.

agentBrokerBridge.codexSidebarCommands.description: VS Code command IDs to try when opening the Codex sidebar.

agentBrokerBridge.confirmStrictModelRequ.description: Before sending a strict target-model request, ask the user to select the requested Antigravity model.

agentBrokerBridge.autoSelectStrictModel.description: Attempt to select the requested Antigravity model automatically before sending strict requests.

agentBrokerBridge.useCdpModelSelection.description: Use Antigravity's Chrome DevTools Protocol debug port for stricter automatic model selection. OFF by default: the CDP port is an unauthenticated local debug surface — only enable it after deliberately launching Antigravity with --remote-debugging-port.

agentBrokerBridge.cdpPort.description: Local Chrome DevTools Protocol port used for Antigravity UI model selection.

agentBrokerBridge.cdpSelectorPath.description: Optional override path for the CDP model-selection helper script.

agentBrokerBridge.nodePath.description: Node executable used to run local helper scripts.

agentBrokerBridge.strictModelAutoSendDel.description: Delay after an automatic model-selection attempt before sending the strict request.

agentBrokerBridge.autoOpenStrictModelSel.description: If automatic strict model selection is disabled, open the model selector automatically and pause the request.

agentBrokerBridge.strictModelAutoResumeD.description: Optional delay for automatically resuming a paused strict-model request after opening the selector. Zero disables auto-resume.

agentBrokerBridge.antigravityAutoSubmit.description: After Antigravity fills the agent panel composer, press Enter to submit the draft.

agentBrokerBridge.antigravityAutoSubmitD.description: Delay before pressing Enter after Antigravity fills the agent panel composer.

agentBrokerBridge.claudeUseTopicSession.description: Route Claude extension requests for the same project/topic into a stable Claude session instead of a new request-id session.

agentBrokerBridge.claudeAutoSubmit.description: After opening a Claude extension draft, attempt to submit it automatically.

agentBrokerBridge.claudeAutoSubmitDelayM.description: Delay before attempting to submit an opened Claude draft.

agentBrokerBridge.claudeInboxStartupMaxA.description: On extension startup, process Claude inbox files newer than this age instead of treating them as stale.
